action.hypothesis: `batch_topk` at the exact active point `K=40, EF=12` was decisively weak, so the next informative move is another fundamentally different sparsity mechanism rather than more residual-family or discrete-trunk tuning. Running `jumprelu` at `K=40, EF=12` with the unchanged `signum`/`lr=1.6e-3`/`auxk_alpha=0` recipe tests whether smoother thresholded support selection recovers low-K quality where routing, residual-VQ, two-code residual-VQ, and batch-budget allocation all failed.
action.summary: Run a proxy mainline comparison for `jumprelu` at `K=40, EF=12` with the unchanged recipe. This stays in the exact active low-K neighborhood, uses the default same-EF comparison band, satisfies the stagnation requirement to try a fundamentally different architecture approach, and reopens a previously archived non-TopK sparsity mechanism instead of creating yet another incubating family.
action.self_review: This keeps the test fair at the same `(K=40, EF=12)` point and changes only architecture. It also follows the strategic pressure to avoid minor retuning and to prefer a structurally different mechanism while not expanding the incubating-family count further.
notes_to_memory: Round 94: `batch_topk` at `K=40, EF=12` was very weak at `0.40311281383037567`, substantially behind the local `lowrank_residual` best `0.17533555254340172`, so the batch-budget hypothesis did not help in the exact low-K neighborhood.
Given the growing incubating set, prefer reopening archived fundamentally different mechanisms with prior signal over starting another brand-new family.
The active low-K point `(K=40, EF=12)` has now rejected routing, two-code residual-VQ, and batch-budget allocation as local winners.
next_hypotheses: If `jumprelu` at `K=40, EF=12` is competitive, keep the family fixed and map `K=32, EF=12` before touching EF.

If `jumprelu` is also weak at the exact active point, archive stale weak incubating families and consider that the current reconstruction-only search objective may be the flawed direction rather than the sparse mechanism alone.
If several distinct sparse-mechanism probes remain weak at `K=40, EF=12`, refocus the next architecture move on a stronger problem reformulation rather than another local mechanism swap.
